overview: Physician-guided TRT and BHRT hormone care delivered via telehealth with lab-driven assessment, personalized treatment plans, and ongoing protocol-based monitoring.
highlights: Lab-driven care with required baseline blood work
Protocol-driven monitoring with dose adjustments based on follow-up labs
Direct provider access with 24-hour response time via patient portal
targetAudience: Men and women seeking personalized hormone therapy guided by licensed clinicians with ongoing clinical support.
